metadata.name: ww-div
metadata.description: A flexible container element (Flexbox) for layout management. Supports flex, block, grid, and inline display modes with repeatable children.
features: Multiple display modes (flex, block, grid, inline variants)

properties.name: children
properties.description: Repeatable child elements. Bind a collection to repeat children for each item.

slots.name: children
slots.description: Child elements rendered inside the container. Can be repeated with bound data.

specifications: Display property must always be included in styles even when bound
Grid template only supports simplified formats: repeat(2,1fr) or 1fr 1fr
For responsive designs, define gridTemplateColumns across different breakpoints
Children slot must be present even if empty
To center a single child element (e.g. an icon), set justifyContent: 'center' and alignItems: 'center' on the div wrapper.
